calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Alba Ingram, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAUL M. GELB OF THE DRINKER BIDDLE & REATH LLP, TEL. NO. (310) 203-4028 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ALBA INGRAM, TEL. NO. 503-8685, PETITIONER ALSO APPEARING IN COURT.

RULING - THE COURT INQUIRED WHETHER MS. INGRAM UNDERSTOOD THE COMPROMISE AMOUNT SHE WOULD BE GETTING AND INQUIRED WHY SHE AGREED TO THE SETTLED AMOUNT. AFTER HAVING BEEN SATISFIED WITH THE EXPLANATION, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Alba Ingram, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee is Granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR # 12913 =(302/EHG)
